plan_type_rationale: 4 targeted file edits (headers) + 2 new test files. No architectural changes. Classic light scope.

phases.name: Add semantic headers to all 4 CLI entry points

tasks.description: Add @coderef-semantic header block to src/cli/populate.ts. Header: @capability cli-populate, @layer cli, @exports main, parseArgs, printHelp, run, runGenerator

Add @coderef-semantic header block to src/cli/rag-index.ts. Header: @capability cli-rag-index, @layer cli, @exports main, parseArgs, printHelp, createLLMProvider, createVectorStore, loadRAGDependencies

Add @coderef-semantic header block to src/cli/rag-search.ts. Header: @capability cli-rag-search, @layer cli, @exports main, parseArgs, printHelp, createLLMProvider, createVectorStore, formatResult, loadRAGDependencies
Add @coderef-semantic header block to src/cli/rag-status.ts. Header: @capability cli-rag-status, @layer cli, @exports main, parseArgs, printHelp, formatBytes, formatDuration, formatRelativeTime

phases.name: Add unit tests for rag-index.ts and rag-status.ts

tasks.description: Create __tests__/rag-index-cli.test.ts. Tests: parseArgs defaults, --provider flag, --store flag, --reset flag, --lang flag, CODEREF_RAG_LOCAL_ONLY rejection for cloud providers when set.
Create __tests__/rag-status-cli.test.ts. Tests: parseArgs defaults, --json flag, --project-dir flag, formatBytes output, formatDuration output, formatRelativeTime output.
Run npx vitest run --no-coverage. Verify 1496+ tests pass + new tests pass. AC: zero new failures.
Commit: feat(cli): add semantic headers to 4 CLI entry points + unit tests for rag-index and rag-status

acceptance_criteria: All 4 CLI files have @capability, @layer, @exports semantic headers written
Tests added for rag-index.ts parseArgs and local-only enforcement
Tests added for rag-status.ts parseArgs and utility formatting functions
Test suite passes with 1496+ tests (no regressions, plus new tests)
